title: hydropix/TranslateBooksWithLLMs
summary: Translate full-length books and documents with Ollama, OpenAI (comptatible), Gemini, Mistral, Poe or OpenRouter. Preserves formatting. Resumes where you left off. No file size limits.

title: ThomasShen2023/karmicmap
summary: Single-file AI causal graph tool. Paste text → interactive network. Zero install.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
summary: Cognithor - Agent OS: Local-first autonomous agent operating system. 16 LLM providers, 17 channels, 112+ MCP tools, 5-tier memory, A2A protocol, knowledge vault, voice, browser automation, Computer-use, self-healing, self-improving. Python 3.12+, Apache 2.0.

title: KazKozDev/LISTING-INTELLIGENCE
summary: Full-stack AI application for marketplace listing intelligence, compliance review, competitor analysis, and deterministic image operations.

title: syklon99/ai-chatbot-svelte
summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: Uragon005/ai-chatbot-svelte
summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: JetBrains/koog
summary: Koog is a JVM (Java and Kotlin) framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant and enterprise-ready AI agents across all platforms – from backend services to Android and iOS, JVM, and even in-browser environments. Koog is based on our AI products expertise and provides proven solutions for complex LLM and AI problems

title: luoboask/evo-agents
summary: Complete Workspace Template for OpenClaw - Full agent lifecycle with unified memory system (Markdown + SQLite), self-evolution, RAG. Not for SubAgent/Skill use.

title: BaiGanio/aperio
summary: One brain. Every AI agent. Nothing forgotten. — Self-hosted memory layer via MCP + Postgres + pgvector

title: nlink-jp/lite-series
summary: A collection of lightweight CLI tools for working with local and cloud LLMs

title: 1Panel-dev/MaxKB
summary: 🔥 MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents.  强大易用的开源企业级智能体平台。

title: KIM3310/Nexus-Hive
summary: Multi-agent NL-to-SQL copilot with governed analytics and multi-warehouse support (Snowflake, Databricks).

title: jnMetaCode/agency-orchestrator
summary: 🤖 一句话编排 AI 工作流 — 186 个专业角色、自动 DAG 并行、YAML 零代码。支持 OpenClaw / Claude Code / Cursor / Copilot 等 14 个 AI 编程工具 + DeepSeek / Claude / OpenAI / Ollama

title: playanth95978/enterprise-rag-chatbot-spring-ai
summary: AI-powered enterprise chatbot using RAG architecture to query and retrieve insights from internal knowledge systems (Confluence, Jira, GitHub), built with Spring Boot and Angular.

title: sterlp/eclipse-peon-ai
summary: An Eclipse plugin that supports offline and online LLMs/AIs with an integration into eclipse itself. Based on langchain4j including support for ollama, mistral, gemini, github copilot etc. Offline or online as we like.

title: Orellius/cortex-terminal
summary: AI-first multi-model terminal. Claude + Ollama + MCP tools in one interface. Built with Tauri 2.0, Rust, React 19, xterm.js.
